description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the global image viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 and a node:8 image for the build-project job, with a cache of node_modules. Define a build-project job that runs only on master and develop, executes the shell commands: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c \"grunt test\"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c \"grunt release\", and stores coverage/, doc/, dist/ as artifacts expiring in 1 day with a coverage regex. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on master, depends on build-project, runs ls -l, mkdir .public, moves coverage/ to .public/coverage/, moves doc/ to .public/doc/, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact expiring in 90 days.
